Calculation.Text: Let ( [ json1 = "{" & Case ( ValueCount ( FAT ModifierValue @ Title::Value JSON ) = 0 ; "" ; Substitute ( List ( FAT ModifierValue @ Title::Value JSON ) ; ¶ ; ", " ) & "" ) & "}"; json3 = JSONSetElement ( json1 ; ["id" ; FAT Title::PrimaryKey ; JSONString ] ; ["context" ; FAT Title::Context ID ; JSONString ] ; ["friendly_id" ; FAT Title::JSON friendly id ; JSONString ] ; ["base_project" ; FAT Title::Base project ; JSONString ] ; ["client" ; FAT Title::Client id ; JSONString ] ; ["title_txt_id" ; FAT Title::Header txt id ; JSONString ] ; ["sub_title_1_txt_id" ; FAT Title::Sub header txt id ; JSONString ] ; ["original_language" ; FAT Title::Original language code ; JSONString] ; ["original_country" ; FAT Title::Original country code ; JSONString] ; ["original_localisation_code" ; FAT Title::Original localisation code ; JSONString] ; ["installed_languages" ; ValueListToCommaList ( FAT Title::Original localisation code; List ( FAT Localisation::Localisation code)) ; JSONString] ; ["number_of_links" ; FAT Title::Number of packages ; JSONNumber ]; ["hierarchy_level" ; "0" ; JSONNumber ]; ["backend" ; PrettifyDash(Case(FAT Title::Title Backend="Funkis Cloud"; "Quiddity"; FAT Title::Title Backend)) ; JSONString ] ); json4 = FAT Theme::Theme JSON ]; // Let Result - Merging Theme JSON Case ( Not IsEmpty(FAT Theme::PrimaryKey) ; While ( // initial variables [ i=0 ; ThemeKeys = JSONListKeys ( json4 ; "" ) ; ThemeValues = JSONListValues( json4 ; "" ); // json3 must be declared again for the while scope! json3 = json3 ]; // condition i<ValueCount ( ThemeKeys ) ; // logic [ i=i+1; json3 = JSONSetElement ( json3 ; GetValue ( ThemeKeys ; i ); GetValue ( ThemeValues ; i ) ; JSONString ) ]; // result JSONFormatElements (json3 ) ); JSONFormatElements ( json3 ) ) )

Field.name: PrimaryKey
Field.comment: Unique identifier of each record in this table

Field.name: CreationTimestamp
Field.comment: Date and time each record was created

Field.name: CreatedBy
Field.comment: Account name of the user who created each record

Field.name: ModificationTimestamp
Field.comment: Date and time each record was last modified

Field.name: ModifiedBy
Field.comment: Account name of the user who last modified each record

Field.name: Icon image
Field.comment: Converts to a thumbnail of 180x120 pixels

Field.name: Business System Production id
Field.comment: Production id from Funkis Biz and similar

Field.name: URL Web development
Field.comment: Path for continous integration from Gitlab to funkisweb.se

Field.name: Original language code
Field.comment: Try to get rid of this field

Validation.Message: You must decide in which language the learning programme originally will be produced in.

Field.name: gViewTranslatedLanguage
Field.comment: Boolean being used to decide wether the CMT shall display original language or translated

Field.name: gLevel
Field.comment: Constant - should be "Learning programme"

Field.name: Latest Imported File
Field.comment: Used for import of JSON files, translated JSON files etc

Calculation.Text: 0 + Sum ( FAT Package::Number of page items )

Field.name: Latest Exported file
Field.comment: Used as a temporary container with internal storage for export of JSON files

Field.name: Original country code
Field.comment: Try to get rid of this field

Field.name: gSelectedLocalisation
Field.comment: Used in a popup menu when creating or cloning title

Field.name: gTranslationMethod
Field.comment: Used in a popup menu

Calculation.Text: If ( Original country code ≠ "" ; Original language code & "-" & Original country code ; Original language code )

Field.name: ChooseLocalisationCode
Field.comment: Try to get rid of this field

Field.name: gModifierValues
Field.comment: Previously called stateToggle States

Field.name: GitLab URL
Field.comment: URL to the project on GitLab - for download, build and publish functionality

Field.name: Title Levels
Field.comment: Which levels are available to build - Package,Chapter,Page

Field.name: Base project
Field.comment: Which base project code used for this learning programme

Field.name: Reference title
Field.comment: The reference title

Validation.Message: The reference title of a Title cannot be empty and must be unique.

Calculation.Text: Case (gViewTranslatedLanguage ; Language Translated @ Title::Language Country; Language Original @ Title::Language Country)
Case (gViewTranslatedLanguage ; Language Translated @ Title::Flag; Language Original @ Title::Flag)

Field.name: FC Client directory
Field.comment: Don't mix up with client domain - should be declared in publish server

Field.name: Title Backend
Field.comment: The main backend for the Title

Field.name: gThemeTemplate
Field.comment: Used in a popup menu

Calculation.Text: Case ( IsEmpty (FC Client directory) And FC Title directory ≠ "" ; FC Title directory & "/"; IsEmpty (FC Title directory) And FC Client directory ≠ "" ; FC Client directory & "/"; IsEmpty (FC Title directory) And IsEmpty (FC Client directory) ; ""; //else FC Client directory & "/" & FC Title directory & "/" )

Field.name: LRS Endpoint Development
Field.comment: The URL to the LRS Endpoint during test

Calculation.Text: Let ( [ jsonlist = List ( FAT Package::Package list JSON ); json = "[" & Substitute ( jsonlist ; "¶" ; "," ) & "]" ]; JSONFormatElements (json) )

Field.name: Title isLive
Field.comment: Boolean that decides if the publish server is live or not.

Field.name: Old PrimaryKey from clone
Field.comment: If Title is cloned this id is used for reference in clone script

Field.name: gExportingPackageNum
Field.comment: The sort number of the package exported - Exporting with delay with 30 sec between each build.

Field.name: gRelationString
Field.comment: Used for a temporary realation to view all Titles when adding titles to a user.

Field.name: Funkis Cloud Title id
Field.comment: If the Title name is changed in FAT, name will not be changed on Cloud

Field.name: Title Environment
Field.comment: The title environment provide FAT with a preview server and a publish server. The environment is given by a default selection.

Field.name: Client id
Field.comment: Client id introduced in Aug 2023

Calculation.Text: 0 + Count ( FAT Localisation::PrimaryKey )- Count(FAT Localisation @ Title::PrimaryKey)

Field.name: TextInContextualOrderTimeStamp
Field.comment: Timestamp that indicates when texts in title are arranged in the contextual order

Field.name: gStartPackageType
Field.comment: The fiorst package of the Title

Field.name: gModifierPrivilege
Field.comment: Developer, Author, Editor, Translator

Field.name: gModifierImportance
Field.comment: 1=Basic, 2=Advanced

Field.name: gModifierGroup
Field.comment: Modifiers of specific groups

Calculation.Text: "Your suffix cannot be longer than 8 characters!"

Validation.Message: "Your suffix cannot be longer than 8 characters!"

Field.name: gCloneDefaultSettings
Field.comment: The default settings for the clone item

Field.name: gCloneItemInfo
Field.comment: Information about the clone item to be displayed in the Clone Item popup window

Field.name: Codebase id
Field.comment: Controls all Packages Codebase id

Field.name: Codebase version id
Field.comment: Controls all Packages version id

Field.name: gIOFilter
Field.comment: Used for filtering the IO popup list to only display a specific tyoe of media in value list IO of type

Field.name: gClient
Field.comment: Used when looking for other titles from the same client. Move packages, re-use translations etc.

Field.name: gTitle
Field.comment: Used when selecting another title - i.e moving a package, reuse translations

Field.name: gAIPromptCaller
Field.comment: From which type of item the AI prompt is called. "Package", "Page", "List" etc.

Field.name: gReadyStatus
Field.comment: Set to "Ready to use" at FAT startup. Used for Value Lists

Field.name: Current FAT Version
Field.comment: Can FAT 3, FAT 4 and similar.
